sections.paragraph:
אליזבת טיילור

Elizabeth Taylor (1932-2011), British-born American actress known for her purplish-blue eyes who starred in many films ("National Velvet" {1944}, "A Place in the Sun"{1951}, "Cat on a Hot Tin Roof" {1951} "Cleopatra" {1963}, "Who's Afraid of Virginia Woolf?" {1966} and many many more)
